declarations.description:
Interactive hotspot annotations for images. Display contextual tooltip
cards on click or hover with custom content overlays and animations.
declarations.name: Hotspot

cssProperties.description: Width and height of the trigger button
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-trigger-size

cssProperties.description: Background color of the trigger button
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-trigger-bg

cssProperties.description: Background color of the trigger on hover/active
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-trigger-bg-hover

cssProperties.description: Icon color inside the trigger button
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-trigger-color

cssProperties.description: Box shadow used as focus outline on the trigger
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-focus-outline

cssProperties.description: Color for the focus outline on the close button
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-focus-outline-color

cssProperties.description: Primary text color inside the popover
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-popover-color

cssProperties.description: Secondary content text color inside the popover
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-popover-content-color

cssProperties.description: Border radius of the popover card
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-popover-border-radius

cssProperties.description: Box shadow of the popover card
cssProperties.name: --uibit-hotspot-popover-shadow

cssParts.description: The root container wrapping image and all hotspots
cssParts.name: container

cssParts.description: The positioning wrapper for each hotspot
cssParts.name: wrapper

cssParts.description: Added to the trigger when the popover is open
cssParts.name: trigger-active

cssParts.description: The content area inside the popover
cssParts.name: popover-content

cssParts.description: The close button inside the popover
cssParts.name: popover-close

slots.description: Default slot for the background image or content
Custom content for the popover of a specific hotspot (by id)
slots.name: popover-{id}

members.name: hotspots
members.description: Array of hotspot items. Each item requires `id`, `x` (%), `y` (%), `label`, and optionally `title` and `content`.

members.name: interactive
members.description: When `false`, hotspots are rendered but not clickable or hoverable.

members.name: trigger
members.description: Interaction mode for showing the popover.

events.name: hotspot-click
events.description: Fired when a hotspot trigger is activated

attributes.name: hotspots
attributes.description: Array of hotspot items. Each item requires `id`, `x` (%), `y` (%), `label`, and optionally `title` and `content`.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: When `false`, hotspots are rendered but not clickable or hoverable.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Interaction mode for showing the popover.

declarations.name: styles
declarations.default: css` :host { display: block; position: relative; width: 100%; } .hotspot-container { position: relative; width: 100%; } .hotspot-wrapper { position: absolute; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 10; } .hotspot-trigger { width: var(--uibit-hotspot-trigger-size, 32px); height: var(--uibit-hotspot-trigger-size, 32px); background: var(--uibit-hotspot-trigger-bg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)); border: var(--uibit-hotspot-trigger-border, 2px solid #ffffff); border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); position: relative; transition: transform 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; outline: none; padding: 0; } .hotspot-trigger::before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background: inherit; animation: pulse 2s infinite; z-index: -1; opacity: 0.6; } @keyframes pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.6; } 100% { transform: scale(2.2); opacity: 0; } } .hotspot-trigger:hover, .hotspot-trigger.active { background: var(--uibit-hotspot-trigger-bg-hover, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85)); transform: scale(1.1); } .hotspot-trigger:focus-visible { box-shadow: var(--uibit-hotspot-focus-outline, 0 0 0 3px #000000), 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .hotspot-trigger::after { content: '+'; color: var(--uibit-hotspot-trigger-color, white); font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; } .hotspot-trigger.active::after { content: '×'; font-size: 20px; } .hotspot-popover { position: absolute; width: 240px; background: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-bg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); color: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-color, #111827); padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-border-radius, 12px); box-shadow: var( --uibit-hotspot-popover-shadow, 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) ); border: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-border, 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)); z-index: 20; display: flex; flex-direction: column; animation: fadeIn 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, 8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, 0); } } .hotspot-popover.position-above { bottom: 24px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); } .hotspot-popover.position-below { top: 24px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); } .hotspot-popover::after { content: ''; position: absolute; border-style: solid; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); } .hotspot-popover.position-above::after { top: 100%; border-width: 6px 6px 0 6px; border-color: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-bg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)) transparent transparent transparent; } .hotspot-popover.position-below::after { bottom: 100%; border-width: 0 6px 6px 6px; border-color: transparent transparent var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-bg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)) transparent; } .popover-content h3 { margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-color, #111827); } .popover-content p { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--uibit-hotspot-popover-content-color, #4b5563); } .popover-close { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; background: transparent; border: none; color: #9ca3af; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; padding: 0; line-height: 1; width: 18px; height: 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 50%; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .popover-close:hover { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); color: #111827; } .popover-close:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--uibit-hotspot-focus-outline-color, #000000); } `
